---
title: "IDA21 Policy Commitment: Institutional Strengthening"
subtitle: "IDA countries without operational engagements"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  word_document:
    reference_docx: null
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 8,
  fig.height = 5
)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggthemes)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(here)

devtools::load_all()

theme_set(theme_minimal())

wb_projects_gov <- portfolioreview::wb_projects_gov

wb_country_ida <- portfolioreview::wb_country_list |> 
  distinct(country_code, country_name) |> 
  left_join(
    portfolioreview::wb_income_and_region |> select(country_code, lending_category),
    by = "country_code"
  ) |> 
  filter(
    lending_category %in% c("IDA", "Blend")
  ) |> 
  select(country_code, lending_category)

wb_country_ida_no_gov <- wb_country_ida |> 
    anti_join(
        wb_projects_gov,
        by = c("country_code")
    )
```
